| `mul` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 \times rs2)[31{:}0]$ | *Multiply* | R |
| `mulh` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 \times rs2)[63{:}32]$ (enters) | *Multiply High* | R |
| `mulhu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 \times rs2)[63{:}32]$ (naturals) | *Multiply High Unsigned* | R |
| `mulhsu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 \times rs2)[63{:}32]$ (`rs1` enter, `rs2` natural) | *Multiply High Signed-Unsigned* | R |
